title: Feedback → Regeneration Adherence
capability_note: Live again: Guided mode was restored on 2026-07-13, so a user can regenerate a chunk with a reason (server /api/guided/{id}/regenerate). The reason is also recorded by the self-evolution store.
description: When a user regenerates content with a stated reason, the new content must actually address that reason — not a random reroll, and not ignoring the instruction.
criterion: The regenerated chunk visibly satisfies the user's reason while preserving correctness and scope.

rubric.5: Reason fully addressed; rest intact and still correct.
rubric.1: Reason ignored, or change unrelated to the reason.

input.reason: Make the analogy concrete — use a real-world example
input.before_analogy: TCP is like a reliable abstraction layer
input.after_analogy: TCP is like registered post: you get a delivery confirmation for every letter.

cases.rationale: Analogy became concrete/everyday, exactly as asked.
Length reduced to the requested budget.

input.before_analogy: TCP is like a reliable abstraction layer
input.after_analogy: TCP is like a dependable conceptual guarantee mechanism

input.reason: Add a diagram description for the handshake
input.change_made: reworded the title only, no visual guidance added

cases.rationale: Change is unrelated to the stated reason.
